series_metadata.series_description: Requests made for public access or copies of public records. May include fee invoicing information.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved;then destroy., Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Delete
